name: audio
summary: Audio subsystem: BGM (ALSeqPlayer), SFX (3x ALSndPlayer), audio heap, AI hardware DMA, ASP RSP ucode task.

structs.fields: data, len, pad[90], aiBufSize(=2), selfLink, pad[6]

functions.audio_ostask_init: Init OSTask with ASP ucode addresses for RSP audio processing
functions.audio_state_reset: Reset all audio state globals to defaults
functions.audio_init: Main audio init: alHeapInit → state_reset → synth config → seq+snd player new
functions.audio_heap_alloc: Allocate audio heap buffers: DMA pool, cmd bufs, AI bufs, ALBankFile, SFX banks
functions.audio_reinit: Reinit audio: unload all SFX banks, flush DMA, alClose, audio_init
functions.audio_synth_config: Configure AL synth: set DMA proc, output rate (osAiSetFrequency), alloc frames, alInit
functions.audio_frame_render: Render one audio frame: alAudioFrame → setup OSTask with cmd list + AI buffer
functions.audio_dma_callback: Audio DMA proc for alAudioFrame: manages 8-entry DMA buffer pool with LRU aging
functions.audio_get_dma_proc: Return DMA proc wrapper, init pool if first call
functions.audio_dma_wait: Wait for pending DMAs, age out old buffers (based on frame counter)
functions.audio_frame_update: Frame update: call render + dma_wait if any audio active (BGM or SFX)
functions.audio_submit_task: Submit audio OSTask to RSP via gRspMessageQueue, play pending SFX sounds
functions.audio_sfx_play: Play SFX by bank index + sound index; handles pan (mono/stereo per player config)
functions.audio_sfx_stop: Stop a specific SFX by bank + sound index
functions.audio_sfx_stop_bank: Stop all sounds in one bank
functions.audio_sfx_stop_all: Stop all sounds in all 3 banks
functions.audio_fade_complete: Task callback: decrement counter, TASK_END when < 0
functions.audio_fade_out_task: Fade out task: decrement SFX+BGM volume over ~27 frames, clean up at 0
functions.audio_fade_in_task: Fade in task: wait 16 frames or until unmute, then play BGM
functions.audio_sfx_set_pan: Set pan for all sounds in a bank
functions.audio_sfx_set_vol: Set volume for all sounds in a bank
functions.wad_setup_sfx_bank: Setup SFX bank from WAD: alBnkfNew, allocate all sounds, set volume

globals.sAudioFrameCtx: Frame context: 2 cmd buffers + 3 AI buffer descriptors
globals.sAudioBufPool: DMA buffer pool queue (initialized flag + linked list)
globals.sAudioFrameCount: Audio frame counter (increments after each DMA flush)
globals.sAudioCmdBufIndex: Command buffer index (0/1, toggles each frame)
globals.sAudioHeapBufLen: Heap allocation len per AI buffer (bufLen + 0x60)
globals.sAudioCmdBufSize: Command buffer size in Acmd units
globals.sAudioFramesRendered: Number of frames rendered in current audio_submit_task call
globals.sAudioBusy: Audio busy flag (counts pending stop/start ops)
globals.sPendingSfxId: Pending SFX sound IDs per bank (-1 = none)
globals.sAudioMuteReq: Mute request flag (set by fade_out task)
globals.sAudioDmaIOMesgs: 32 DMA IO message structs for osPiStartDma
globals.sBgmPlaying: BGM is playing / music enabled flag
globals.sSfxPlaying: SFX is playing / sound effects enabled flag
globals.sAudioMuted: Audio mute flag (all audio disabled when set)
globals.sAudioForceMute: Force mute flag (set externally, cleared by audio_unmute)
globals.sAudioAiBufPtr: Pointer to current AI DMA buffer descriptor
globals.sSfxSndIds: SFX sound ID arrays (30 ALSndId per bank)
globals.sSfxBankLoaded: SFX bank loaded flags per slot (0/1/2)
globals.sSfxSoundCount: Number of sounds in each SFX bank

open_questions: sAudioUnk1 (D_800A4514), sAudioUnk2 (D_800A4518) — unknown counters, never checked externally?
sAudioBufEntry.aiBufSize field = 2 — hardcoded, what does 2 mean?
sSfxPanState[2] — relationship to PlayerInputState.x_d93bcabf pan mode is clear but exact values (20 vs 100) are heuristics
@bug at audio_sfx_stop line 487: sSfxPlaying = TRUE set but no sound is played
@bug at audio_fade_in_task line 573: sBgmPlaying checked twice instead of different conditions
